mapper.select: SELECT o.order_id, o.total_price, oi.order_item_id, oi.product_id, p.product_name, oi.quantity, oi.unit_price, f.flavor_name FROM orders o LEFT JOIN order_items oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id LEFT JOIN products p ON oi.product_id = p.product_id LEFT JOIN order_item_flavors oif ON oi.order_item_id = oif.order_item_id LEFT JOIN icecream_flavors f ON oif.flavor_id = f.flavor_id WHERE o.order_id = #{orderId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO payments (order_id, payment_method, base_amount, final_amount, point_used, payment_status) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{paymentMethod}, #{baseAmount}, #{finalAmount}, #{pointUsed}, #{paymentStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE orders SET payment_method = #{paymentMethod}, total_price = #{finalAmount}, order_status = 'COMPLETED' WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
